testsuite.name: tests.DropdownTest

testcase.name: validateLandingPage
testcase.system-out:
Landing page URL is correct
Landing page title is correct
Landing page UI loaded correctly

testcase.name: createAccountTest
testcase.system-out:
Clicking on Create Account link
Create Account page title validated successfully

testcase.name: inputTest
testcase.system-out:
Entering user name
Entering email ID
Checking email availability
Selecting auto-suggested email
Entering password
Re-entering password

testcase.name: testDOB_Dropdown
testcase.system-out:
Day dropdown is enabled
Month dropdown is enabled
Year dropdown is enabled
Selecting Date of Birth from dropdowns

testcase.name: validateCountrySelection
testcase.system-out:
Country dropdown is enabled
Country selected and validated

testcase.name: testCityDropdown
testcase.system-out:
City dropdown is enabled
City selected successfully

testsuite.system-out:
Landing page URL is correct
Landing page title is correct
Landing page UI loaded correctly
Clicking on Create Account link
Create Account page title validated successfully
Entering user name
Entering email ID
Checking email availability
Selecting auto-suggested email
Entering password
Re-entering password
Day dropdown is enabled
Month dropdown is enabled
Year dropdown is enabled
Selecting Date of Birth from dropdowns
Selecting gender
Country dropdown validated
Country dropdown is enabled
Country selected and validated
City dropdown is enabled
City selected successfully Alternate ID checkbox selected
